title: dumpbolt: handle nested buckets
body: When iterating through a bucket, a key with no value is a sub-bucket.  Dump the contents of those buckets after the non-sub-buckets.

comments.body: @nalind TY for looking into this - we use sub-buckets a lot in the libpod schema
